bookkeeper.dual_hat_disclosure: bookkeeper 与 implementer-A 同为 claude_glm 模型但强制不同会话；记账不产生代码作者身份；review-2 评估此披露

designer: fable5 (anthropic/claude-fable-5) — direction draft, stage design, all dispatch prompts; created stage branch + design packet commit (design-time filing, disclosed)
hard_constraints: 永久禁令：POST/PUT/DELETE、交易语义端点、listenKey/user data stream/websocket（含铺垫代码）
单一 HMAC 出口 = backend/services/private_client.py（grep 断言）
deny-by-default (method, exact-path) 白名单，签名构造前拦截
key/secret 任何片段不得进代码/日志/报告/fixture
进 git 的样本/报告/fixture 数值按 §2.A 脱敏标记表脱敏（运行时页面真实展示不受限）
classify.py / normalize.py 零改动；枚举与优先级零改动
E1/E1b 为 discovery-only，本轮快照装配不调用
开发中途新增端点 = R3 升级，禁止顺手加
实现终端不 commit、不碰 status.json；R10 收尾段必须机械执行
review-2 ACCEPT 只进 stage_accepted_waiting_user；merge 回 main 仅限用户明确验收后（bookkeeper 不得代翻 accepted）
本 stage 全部提交只落 stage/2026-07-private-account-v1 分支

model_routing.review_2: codex gpt5.5 first; disclosure reviewer_prior_involvement=direction_synthesis+direction_review; strong-reviewer override per AGENTS.md; fallback claude per existing rules

tasks.title: backend: cost-leg chain / contract v0.3 / net yield / coverage probing / asset aggregation
frontend: private panel / aggregated asset view / net yield column / sort_basis label / privacy toggle

attempts.note: script healthy (public ticker/price 200; signing code identical to proven phase2 discovery; fresh re-source + single E6 retry still -2015). Account-level endpoints reject the current key/IP combination.

attempts.fix_applied: E2 /sapi/v1/margin/next-hourly-interest-rate call now sends required isIsolated=false (was returning 400 -3026 missing-param); all other 11 whitelist endpoints + public ticker/price unchanged.
attempts.note: User resolved API-key auth (-2015 cleared via IP/permissions). Fresh re-source + clean re-run: all 14 calls 200, E3/E4/E6 PASSED, G2 blocking gate cleared. Weight headers captured per-call (X-MBX-USED-WEIGHT-1M / X-SAPI-USED-*-WEIGHT-1M) -> frozen into 10-design §2.A.1/§2.A.2.

commit_state: H_intake PASSED (G1-G5 all green): discovery script + clean-run evidence (14/14 calls HTTP 200, E3/E4/E6 PASS) + 10-design §2.A appendix (frozen weights/budget/field-matrix/redaction-table/chain-hit) + design fixture committed on stage branch; base_sha + h_intake.committed_sha backfilled to this commit's sha in a follow-up status-only commit (status.json cannot reference its own sha). Parallel dispatch next.
next_action: Dispatch Task A (fresh claude_glm backend session) + Task B (Kimi frontend terminal) in parallel; implementers do NOT commit / do NOT touch status.json / must mechanically execute R10 tail on completion. Bookkeeper does R4 diff reconciliation then serial commits H_A (backend) -> H_B (frontend), recomputes fingerprint, sets status=review_1, runs validate checkpoint + pre-review.
evidence_policy: raw outputs verbatim; capture-time redaction for account-level data; all endpoint claims carry llms-full.txt line refs or live capture paths
